title: Roasted American Teque Nos Skewers
description: A nostalgic American dish featuring pre-fried teque nos, robata-grilled to perfection, sugar-free-friendly and bouncy-qq.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the pre-fried teque nos onto the wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, paprika, and onion powder.
Brush the mixture onto the teque nos, making sure they are fully coated.
Place the skewers onto the robata grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the roasted American teque nos skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
